AboutSection.title: What is Demosmap?
AboutSection.description: Demosmap is a data intelligence technology company that transforms the analysis of behavior, territory, and opinion of target audiences into actionable strategic intelligence. We work for private organizations and public institutions to detect patterns, anticipate trends, and activate effective strategies.

step1.title: UNDERSTAND YOUR TARGET AUDIENCE BETTER
step1.description: Gain a broad and deep view of the interests, needs, and behaviors of your organization’s target audiences, both internal and external.

step2.title: IMPROVE YOUR CAMPAIGNS
step2.description: Segment with micro-precision and exponentially increase the impact of your commercial and communication actions.

step3.title: DETECT OPPORTUNITIES
step3.description: Anticipate trends, behavioral changes, and new needs before it’s too late.

step4.title: OPTIMIZE YOUR EXPANSION AND TERRITORIAL PRESENCE
step4.description: Identify situations, dynamics, and territorial patterns to make better positioning and growth decisions.

step5.title: PRIORITIZE STRATEGIC DECISIONS
step5.description: Reduce uncertainty in your decision-making using intelligence models that respond to your objectives and future vision.

step6.title: ANTICIPATE FUTURE BEHAVIORS
step6.description: Build predictive capacity and respond to the changes and needs of your context and target audiences.

Footer.fundedByEU: Funded by the European Union - Next GenerationEU
Footer.copyright: © 2023. Handcrafted with love by Mr. Addison

Services.mainTitle: There is more data than ever: it’s time to turn it into strategic intelligence.

service1.title: Target Audience Intelligence
service1.description: We build structured data ecosystems to understand different population segments based on their behavior, territory, and opinion.

service2.title: Advanced Segmentation
service2.description: We identify target audiences according to their shared patterns and behavioral dynamics. We turn complex markets into actionable and effective strategies.

service3.title: Strategic Targeting
service3.description: With proprietary technology we transform insights into concrete actions through segmentation strategies adapted to each population segment, context, and territory.

service4.title: Predictive Intelligence
service4.description: We project predictive scenarios through the accumulation of historical behavioral data. We detect changes in demand and anticipate future scenarios with strategy and intelligence.

TargetAudience.impactStatement: We process objective data on behavior, territories, and opinion, to understand not just what people do, but why they do it

Thanks.title: Thank you for contacting us!
Thanks.message: We have received your message and will get back to you as soon as possible. Thank you for your interest and the trust you have placed in us.
